title: Doff Stop! Cat & Dog Scatter Granules - 700g Shaker Pack – Dog and Cat Repellent Stops Pets from Fouling & Scratching - Outdoor Pest Repellent
features: POWERFUL LASTING PET REPELLENT – Effectively prevent pets from marking, scratching, or fouling with Doff Stop! Cat & Dog Scatter Granules. Infused with aromatic essential oils, the dog and cat repellent granules create an invisible barrier, keeping your garden or outdoor space free from foul odours

EASY & TARGETED APPLICATION – Scatter this dog and cat deterrent for garden directly from the shaker onto soil at 20-30g/m² for simple, mess-free use. Apply a protective ring around pots or containers to safeguard your plants. For lasting results, reapply every 3-7 days or after heavy rain

LONG-LASTING, NATURAL FORMULA – Powered by natural plant extracts like citronella and eucalyptus, this pest repeller slowly releases strong scents over time to repel pets humanely. This cat and dog repellent outdoor solution is safe to use around plants, family and pets when applied as directed

RELIABLE FOULING DETERRENT – With a proven blend of fragrances that pets avoid, our pest control products discourage repeated fouling in the same spots. The user-friendly 700g repellent formula pack helps train pets to avoid treated areas, providing consistent and dependable protection for your outdoors

PET CONTROL EXPERTS – With decades of trusted experience, Doff products provide quality-crafted, dependable outdoor pet solutions. Proudly made in the UK, our pet control range offers proven performance, helping to maintain a clean, safe and comfortable living outdoor space
